case_title: AMERICAN CHECK EXCHANGE DBA ANYKIND CHECK CASHING VS BANK OF AMERICA

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $300.00 FILED BY AMERICAN CHECK EXCHANGE DBA ANYKIND CHECK CASHING CENTER AS TO DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-05-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 05
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AMERICAN CHECK EXCHANGE DBA ANYKIND CHECK CASHING CENTER IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDMENT TO BANK OF AMERICA RETURNED FOR BETTER ADDRESS.
